dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry condition 1: First bar closes strong (above previous close). Entry condition 2: Second bar closes near lows (current close at or below current low, approximated). Entry condition 3: Following days do not trade above midpoint of 2-bar reversal range (approximated using Donchian midpoint as proxy for 2-bar midpoint). Exit when price crosses above the 2-bar midpoint (Donchian middle used as reversal signal). Hold period set to 5 days ('few days' interpretation).

backtest_rule.reason: Entry condition 1: First bar closes strong (above previous close). Entry condition 2: Second bar closes near lows (current close at or below current low, approximated). Entry condition 3: Following days do not trade above midpoint of 2-bar reversal range (approximated using Donchian midpoint as proxy for 2-bar midpoint). Exit when price crosses above the 2-bar midpoint (Donchian middle used as reversal signal). Hold period set to 5 days ('few days' interpretation).

source_rule_text: After a 2-bar reversal pattern (bullish bar followed by bearish bar closing near lows), sell when price does not trade above the midpoint of the 2-bar range in the following days.
